name: Alliance Laundry Holdings Inc.
business: We are the world's largest designer and manufacturer of commercial laundry systems, serving a diverse and resilient range of global end markets. We sell our systems through an extensive global network of approximately 600 distributors and through direct sales channels in certain key markets. Our systems are used in healthcare facilities, fire stations, hotels, laundromats, and communal laundry facilities.

exposures.sentence: The quality control process within our facilities is world-class and includes AI-powered defect monitoring, tests on 100% of machines produced and randomized audits, including full teardowns of finished products.
This control platform works in tandem with our proprietary cloud-connected technology solutions that link over 200,000 machines globally, serving more than three million users.

Speed Queen Insights, Huebsch Command, Primus i-Trace and IPSO Connect provide industry-leading control and insights to Vended laundry customers through functionalities such as performance reporting, issue and error alerts, machine control and programming, a mobile payment platform with an integrated loyalty program and an integrated CRM and marketing system.

Our cybersecurity investments ensure the integrity and reliability of our connected platforms, while our centralized data analytics capabilities enhance our internal visibility into equipment performance and market trends to inform future product innovations.

Recent innovations include our QR code-based payment solution that eliminates the need for app installation, AI-driven operational insights that provide plain-English recommendations to operators and self-healing machine capabilities that can resolve some common issues without technician intervention.

catalysts.sentence: We expect that capital expenditures in 2026 will be approximately $60 million.
The contract became effective on January 1, 2022 and expires February 28, 2027, and contains provisions that are usual and customary.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for commercial, residential and industrial laundry systems was approximately $82 billion in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a third-party market study, the total addressable market for commercial, residential and industrial laundry systems was approximately $82 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Commercial laundry systems industry generated nearly $7.4 billion in revenues in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: Within this market, the commercial laundry systems industry generated nearly $7.4 billion in revenues during the same year.

tamClaims.claim: Laundromat market in North America has approximately 1.1 million machines in the United States alone.
tamClaims.sentence: The laundromat market in North America represents a large installed base, estimated to be 1.1 million machines in the United States alone, according to a third-party market study.
